exemplar.title: To what extent does a country's GDP per capita in 2024 correlate with both the happiness index and depression rates as indicators of well-being?

detailedExemplarData.title: To what extent does a country's GDP per capita in 2024 correlate with both the happiness index and depression rates as indicators of well-being?

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Recognisable narrative guiding reader from research question through conclusion
Clear headings and numbered sections provide basic structural framework
Most content (sampling method, regression work, statistical discussion) directly supports the research question
weaknesses: Frequent stray editing notes and scanned handwriting interrupt logical flow
Irregular placement of tables/figures; captions are embedded or missing
Unnecessary digressions and repeated narrative statements reduce conciseness
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three presentation strands consistently align with Band 2 (âsome coherenceâ, âadequate organizationâ, âmostly relevantâ).  While the exploration is intelligible and follows a sensible order, interruptions from OCR artifacts and inconsistent figure formatting prevent it from reaching Band 3.  Thus, a score of 2 accurately reflects its quality.

strengths: Effective use of multiple representations: scatter plots, fitted curves, residual statistics and comparative tables
Axes are clearly labelled and trend-line equations (with RÂ²) are provided
Key variables and logarithmic transformation (ln) are defined to support understanding
weaknesses: Inconsistent notation (e.g. re-naming parameters, mixed Greek symbols) and typographical errors in equations
Abrupt shifts between models lack clear justification
Occasional paragraph fragmentation due to markup interrupts clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates an effective variety of mathematical representations and generally clear communication, meriting Band 3 for Mathematical Communication.  Despite inconsistent notation and some clarity issues, the strength of the visuals and overall logical progression justify raising this criterion to 3 to reflect the workâs communicative effectiveness.

strengths: Investigation stems from personal context and family experience, showing a clear personal approach
Design of quota-sampling method and model-switching decision indicate significant independent thinking
Introduction of alternative correlation measure and Dominica test display initiative
weaknesses: Methodological creativity remains within standard IA territory rather than highly innovative
Some creative ideas (e.g. exponential model sketch) are not fully developed
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: With consistent Band 2 performance across independent thinking, personal approach and creativity, the student demonstrates a good level of engagement without the exceptional originality required for Band 3.  A score of 2 reflects this solid but not outstanding personal engagement.

strengths: Meaningful reflection throughout, including a dedicated limitations section
Thoughtful analysis of RÂ² values and Spearmanâs Ï, with discussion of data reliability
Clear evaluation of outcomes with concrete suggestions (e.g. alternative indices, generalizability)
weaknesses: Reflection often remains descriptive rather than deeply critical of statistical assumptions
Limited probing of modelling limitations (heteroscedasticity, fit anomalies)
Forward-looking implications and validation plans are underdeveloped
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The reflection demonstrates consistent, meaningful insights and thoughtful analysis, placing it squarely in Band 2.  It lacks the sustained depth and comprehensive future implications required for Band 3, so a score of 2 is appropriate.

strengths: Relevant mathematics (regression, log transformation, correlation coefficients) is applied appropriately to the research question
Mathematics is commensurate with SL course level and demonstrates good understanding
Interpretations of results (RÂ², Ï calculations) are generally correct and sensibly discussed
weaknesses: Minor conceptual slips (variable mis-naming, abrupt model dismissal) indicate areas for greater rigor
Parameter definitions are sometimes incomplete and notation inconsistencies persist
Exploration omits more advanced techniques that could deepen analysis
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the work contains minor errors, the student applies SL mathematics competently and appropriately throughout, warranting Band 4 for Use of Mathematics.  This bump recognizes the consistent and effective use of relevant techniques beyond mere adequacy, while still reflecting the remaining imperfections.

strandSelections.reasoning:
Explanations usually follow the visuals, yet paragraphs are occasionally fragmented and interrupted by markup or scanned comments, reducing clarity.  Logical linkage between some sections (e.g.
 dismissal of exponential model) is stated but not fully justified.  Hence the work demonstrates âsome logical structure and clarityâ rather than the sustained clarity of the higher bands.

Calculations of \(\ln(x)\), regression coefficients, \(R^2\) and Spearmanâs \(\rho\) are mostly accurate and interpreted sensibly.  Minor conceptual slips (e.g.
 mis-naming variables, limited justification when dismissing exponential model) indicate some imperfections, placing understanding at âgood with minor errorsâ rather than the near-perfect accuracy required for higher bands.

Scatter plots, fitted curves, residual statistics, and large comparative tables provide a variety of representations that generally support the argument.  Axes are clearly labelled, and trend lines include equations and \(R^2\) values.  A few images are low-resolution and one theoretical sketch is redundant, but overall the student makes effective use of multiple forms, satisfying the âeffectiveâ descriptor.

The student maintains a recognisable narrative from the research question through to the conclusion and sections follow a sensible order (Introduction, Methodology, Analysis, Conclusion).  However, logical flow is frequently interrupted by stray editing notes (e.g. âA: A clear planâ, âC: lesonal Engagementâ) and fragments of handwriting scans.  These breaks, together with occasional abrupt topic shifts, mean the development is only partially smooth.  Overall coherence is evident but not sustained at a consistently high level, matching the âsome coherenceâ descriptor.

Introducing an alternative correlation measure and devising an accuracy test on Dominica show creativity and initiative at a good level, yet methodological originality remains limited and some ideas (e.g.
 exponential model sketch) are not fully implemented.  This aligns with âgoodâ rather than âexceptionalâ creativity.

The student compares \(R^2\) values, interprets Spearmanâs \(\rho\), and questions data reliability, showing thoughtful analysis.  Nonetheless, the critique does not probe modelling limitations (heteroscedasticity, logarithmic vs linear fit) in depth, so the analysis is âthoughtfulâ rather than âdeep and insightfulâ.

Outcomes are evaluated with concrete suggestions (use Gini coefficient, alternative indices) and acknowledgement of under-diagnosis issues.  These constitute a clear evaluation with implications, but forward projections or robust validation plans are limited, positioning the work in the âclear evaluationâ band.

Reflection is interwoven through the analysis (e.g.
 recognising counter-intuitive rising depression trend) and a dedicated limitations section is provided.  The comments are meaningful but often descriptive and do not deeply interrogate statistical assumptions, fitting the âmeaningful reflection throughoutâ description.

Mathematical symbols (\(\ln, R^2, \rho, e\)) and function notation are used, but inconsistently: variables are re-named (\âIDP\â for GDP), parameters are inadequately defined, and several equations contain typographical errors.  The work shows âsome appropriate language and notationâ yet lacks the mostly consistent accuracy required for the higher bands.

The investigation stems from the studentâs family experience and includes personalised commentary on unexpected results, demonstrating a clear personal approach.  However, creative elements (e.g.
 sampling strategy) are not developed innovatively enough for the highest band.

Most material (sampling method, regression work, statistical discussion) is relevant to addressing the research question; however repeated narrative statements, digressions into world statistics, and handwritten teacher comments introduce unnecessary length.  The exploration is therefore mostly relevant with some unnecessary elements rather than concise throughout.

Regression, logarithmic transformation, \(R^2\), Pearsonâs \(R\), and Spearmanâs \(\rho\) are all relevant and appropriately applied to the research question.  While these methods are correct, the exploration stays within standard SL statistics and omits more advanced techniques, so the mathematics is âused appropriatelyâ rather than âeffectively/comprehensivelyâ.

The choice to design a quota-sampling method, test multiple models, and switch to Spearmanâs \(\rho\) indicates personal initiative beyond a textbook approach.  These decisions show significant independent thinking, but the exploration remains within standard IA territory and does not reach an âoutstandingâ level.

Headings and numbered sections give the work an obvious structure; data, graphs and appendix are sign-posted.  Nevertheless, tables and images are inserted irregularly, some figures lack captions, and the appendix list merges with the main text.  These organisational weaknesses prevent the piece from being described as well organised.  The characteristics align with the rubrics description of basic/adequate organisation with basic structure.

The statistical tools employed (transformations, correlation coefficients) are solidly within the SL syllabus and used at an expected level of sophistication.  They match the descriptor âcommensurate with course levelâ rather than exceeding it.

annotations.comment: The stray âC: Personal expansionâ block interrupts methodological clarity; remove or relocate.
The hypothesis statement is cut off before the exponential decay equation is fully presented; provide the complete function and justify each parameter.
The handwritten comment disrupts the flow and reduces coherence; remove or integrate teacher notes into the appendix.
The research question is clearly stated and linked to personal context, showing a thoughtful personal engagement with the topic.
The caption text is embedded in the figure block and creates clutter; separate it clearly below the image.
The multi-step list demonstrates careful planning of the sampling procedure, reflecting significant independent thinking.
Variables are clearly defined, with both independent and dependent variables listed, supporting mathematical clarity.
Ensure parameter symbols match those used later in analysis and define each in a single notation section.
The model assumptions are well explained, reflecting a thoughtful reflection on theoretical expectations.
Figure 1 lacks a clear caption title; add a descriptive label with figure number and variable units.
The critical note on underreporting depression rates is insightful, acknowledging external factors in data reliability.
The shift from nonlinear to linear analysis is abrupt and unjustified; outline rationale for dismissing the exponential model.
Provide a concise justification for choosing linear regression metrics before dismissal, linking back to hypotheses.
Comparison of RÂ² values to demonstrate relative explanatory power is clearly communicated.
The stray typo âD-Reblechonâ obscures meaning; proofread to remove OCR artifacts.
The description of quota sampling contains stray OCR text and lacks clarity; streamline the narrative and remove unrelated fragments.
Clarify the quota sampling numbers and explain how this method ensures balanced representation and reduces bias.
The stray label âB: Relevent Mathematicalâ interrupts flow and should be removed or clarified.
State explicit null and alternative hypotheses to accompany the variable definitions, improving rigor.
The exponential decay model is accompanied by clear parameter definitions, which enhances mathematical communication.
The equation uses âGDP Â· pâ instead of a clear exponent notation; revise to consistent mathematical symbols.
Standardize figure labeling: include title, axis units, and source beneath each graphic.
The definition of ln is clearly presented, aiding in understanding the logarithmic transformation.
Group the figure and its caption in a single block for clarity in presentation.
The reflective discussion on the counterintuitive trend shows deep engagement with the data.
The explanation that the logarithmic model indicates rising depression requires deeper justification; reconsider the fit or data anomalies.
Discuss potential data issues (e.g., reporting bias) that could cause the unexpected positive slope in depression.
Review text for consistency and eliminate scanned annotations from this section.
The discussion of Spearman's rank application is well explained, demonstrating appropriate use of SL statistics.
Reorganize the Spearman methodology into distinct steps to improve logical structure and readability.
The computation of Ï using Î£dÂ² is correct and demonstrates thorough SL mathematics application.
Inconsistent notation uses Î· instead of Ï to describe monotonicity; correct symbol usage throughout.
Review all equations for uniform symbol conventions and define each Greek letter when first used.
The prediction for Dominica includes a clear relative error calculation and thoughtful discussion of generalizability.
Remove the handwritten note about limited understanding, which does not belong in the main text.
Test the model on additional countries at different income levels to assess robustness of the logarithmic fit.
The limitations section demonstrates comprehensive reflection on data biases and cultural influences.
List items appear in a single block without breaks; separate each limitation into distinct paragraphs.
Number and headline each limitation to enhance organization and guide the reader through critical reflection.
